problem id: e0b993bd
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  11111100 -> 10000001
  10010101 -> 10100001
  10000111 -> 11100001
  00001011 -> 01100000
  10110010 -> 01000001
  10110110 -> 11000001
  00000001 -> 00100000
  11011011 -> 01100001
  10111101 -> 10100001
  01001101 -> 10100000

query: 11110101
predicted answer: 10100001
